name: sdd-plugin
description: Spec-Driven Development workflow for Claude Code

skills.name: create-plan
skills.description: Create a detailed implementation plan through interactive research and iteration

skills.name: implement-plan
skills.description: Implement an approved plan phase by phase with verification checkpoints

skills.name: iterate-plan
skills.description: Update an existing implementation plan based on feedback

skills.name: validate-plan
skills.description: Validate that an implementation matches its plan and all success criteria

skills.name: research-codebase
skills.description: Research the codebase thoroughly and produce a structured findings document with file:line references
